creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hint: if you are a maintainer, you may want to set "maintainer-feedback" to "+" in *Flags * field on Bugzilla. This way its clear that the maintainer is fine with the patch.

BTW, would you like to incorporate the other change suggested in the email? I.e., replacing COPYTREE_SHARE with long the lines of "${INSTALL_DATA} *.png *.theme ${STAGEDIR}${_THEMEDIR}".

Cheers! :)
